# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "vmNamePrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "webvm"
    },
    "instanceCount": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 2,
      "minValue": 1,
      "maxValue": 50
    },
    "vmSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_D2s_v5"
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "azureuser",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Password for the local administrator account."
      }
    },
    "osType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Windows",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Windows",
        "Linux"
      ]
    },
    "windowsImagePublisher": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "MicrosoftWindowsServer"
    },
    "windowsImageOffer": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "WindowsServer"
    },
    "windowsImageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2022-datacenter-g2"
    },
    "linuxImagePublisher": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Canonical"
    },
    "linuxImageOffer": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy"
    },
    "linuxImageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "22_04-lts-gen2"
    },
    "virtualNetworkName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "web-vnet"
    },
    "virtualNetworkAddressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.10.0.0/16"
    },
    "subnetName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "web-subnet"
    },
    "subnetPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.10.1.0/24"
    },
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "web-nsg"
    },
    "publicIpPerVm": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "If true, each VM gets a public IP (for quick deployment/testing)."
      }
    },
    "openRdpSshFromInternet": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "If true, allows inbound RDP (Windows) or SSH (Linux) from Internet. For quick validation only."
      }
    },
    "osDiskType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Premium_LRS",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard_LRS",
        "StandardSSD_LRS",
        "Premium_LRS"
      ]
    },
    "dataDiskCount": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 1,
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 16
    },
    "dataDiskSizeGB": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 128,
      "minValue": 1,
      "maxValue": 32767
    },
    "dataDiskType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Premium_LRS",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard_LRS",
        "StandardSSD_LRS",
        "Premium_LRS"
      ]
    },
    "useAvailabilityZones": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "apiVersionCompute": "2024-03-01",
    "apiVersionNetwork": "2024-01-01",
    "imageReference": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'),'Windows'), createObject('publisher', parameters('windowsImagePublisher'), 'offer', parameters('windowsImageOffer'), 'sku', parameters('windowsImageSku'), 'version', 'latest'), createObject('publisher', parameters('linuxImagePublisher'), 'offer', parameters('linuxImageOffer'), 'sku', parameters('linuxImageSku'), 'version', 'latest'))]",
    "rdpOrSshPort": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'),'Windows'), 3389, 22)]",
    "rdpOrSshRuleName": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'),'Windows'), 'Allow-RDP', 'Allow-SSH')]",
    "httpRuleName": "Allow-HTTP",
    "httpsRuleName": "Allow-HTTPS"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('apiVersionNetwork')]",
      "name": "[parameters('virtualNetworkName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "[parameters('virtualNetworkAddressPrefix')]"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "[parameters('subnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('subnetPrefix')]",
              "networkSecurityGroup": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('apiVersionNetwork')]",
      "name": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "[variables('httpRuleName')]",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 100,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "access": "Allow",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "80",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "[variables('httpsRuleName')]",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 110,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "access": "Allow",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "443",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "[variables('rdpOrSshRuleName')]",
            "condition": "[parameters('openRdpSshFromInternet')]",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 120,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "access": "Allow",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "[string(variables('rdpOrSshPort'))]",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('apiVersionNetwork')]",
      "name": "[format('{0}-pip-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "condition": "[parameters('publicIpPerVm')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard"
      },
      "properties": {
        "publicIPAllocationMethod": "Static",
        "dnsSettings": {
          "domainNameLabel": "[toLower(format('{0}-{1}-{2}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), uniqueString(resourceGroup().id), copyIndex(1)))]"
        }
      },
      "copy": {
        "name": "pipCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('instanceCount')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('apiVersionNetwork')]",
      "name": "[format('{0}-nic-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "properties": {
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic",
              "subnet": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('virtualNetworkName'), parameters('subnetName'))]"
              },
              "publicIPAddress": "[if(parameters('publicIpPerVm'), createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', format('{0}-pip-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))), json('null'))]"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      "copy": {
        "name": "nicCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('instanceCount')]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('virtualNetworkName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', format('{0}-pip-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('apiVersionCompute')]",
      "name": "[format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "copy": {
        "name": "vmCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('instanceCount')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[parameters('vmSize')]"
        },
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "[format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
          "adminUsername": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
          "adminPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]",
          "windowsConfiguration": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'),'Windows'), createObject('provisionVMAgent', true, 'enableAutomaticUpdates', true), json('null'))]",
          "linuxConfiguration": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'),'Linux'), createObject('disablePasswordAuthentication', false, 'provisionVMAgent', true), json('null'))]"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": "[variables('imageReference')]",
          "osDisk": {
            "createOption": "FromImage",
            "managedDisk": {
              "storageAccountType": "[parameters('osDiskType')]"
            }
          },
          "dataDisks": "[if(greater(parameters('dataDiskCount'), 0), array(), json('[]'))]"
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', format('{0}-nic-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]"
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "zones": "[if(parameters('useAvailabilityZones'), createArray(string(add(mod(copyIndex(1),3),1))), json('null'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', format('{0}-nic-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/dataDisks",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('apiVersionCompute')]",
      "name": "[format('{0}-{1}/addDataDisk', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
      "condition": "[greater(parameters('dataDiskCount'), 0)]",
      "copy": {
        "name": "dataDiskAttachCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('instanceCount')]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "dataDisks": "[createArray()]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "vmNames": {
      "type": "array",
      "value": "[array(range(1, add(parameters('instanceCount'), 1)))]"
    }
  },
  "functions": [],
  "resourcesCopy": [],
  "languageVersion": "2.0"
}
